message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as p1 {
    interface INBRPlayCCSink
    class CNBRPfwPlayCtl
}

participant "CNBRPfwUICtrl" as p2

package "CNBRUIMgr" as p3 {
    interface INBRCommand
    class CNBRUIMgr
}

participant "CNBRPlayMgr" as p4
participant "CNBRPlayBar" as p5
participant "CWbxBmpButton" as p6

box "nmac notify nbr_pfw mute message" as b1

INBRPlayCCSink -> CNBRPfwPlayCtl: NotifyInfo
activate INBRPlayCCSink
activate CNBRPfwPlayCtl

INBRPlayCCSink --> CNBRPfwPlayCtl: NotifyInfo
deactivate INBRPlayCCSink

CNBRPfwPlayCtl -> p2: OnMixerMuteNotify
activate p2

note right of CNBRPfwPlayCtl: NBR_CC_PFW_INFO_MUTE_STATE

p2 -> INBRCommand: OnHandleCommand
activate INBRCommand

note right of p2: NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY

INBRCommand --> CNBRUIMgr: OnHandleCommand
deactivate INBRCommand
activate CNBRUIMgr

note right of INBRCommand: NBR2_PLAY_UI_MIXER_MUTE_NOTIFY

CNBRUIMgr -> p4: HandleMixerMuteNotify
activate p4

p4 -> p5: MuteVolume
activate p5

p5 -> p6: SetChecked
activate p6

deactivate p6
deactivate p5
deactivate p4
deactivate CNBRUIMgr
deactivate p2
deactivate CNBRPfwPlayCtl

@enduml
```
